body.title: Verify whether a current graph-tree embedder actually exists (don't trust 'it's built')
body.intention: I intend that build work on the graph-tree embedder starts from verified reality, not a confabulated 'it's built' claim.
body.description:
**Problem:** A prior Sonnet told Akien the rack graph-tree embedder was built; investigation found only the STALE Scraps embedding_engine (OpenAI/hash/wordgraph-sidecar), which Akien confirmed is the OLD version. Existence of a CURRENT graph-tree embedder is unverified.
**Proposed shape:** grep/inventory the repo for a graph-tree / word-graph-based embedding generator that produces node-activation representations (NOT dense vectors). Check word_graph.py, skeleton/rack devices, any 'embed' surface. Output a definitive: EXISTS (name + path + what it produces) OR TO-BE-BUILT.
**Affected files:** none (investigation).
**Design rules:** none.
**Scope boundary:** report only; no edits.
**Completion criteria:** a written verdict naming the current graph-tree embedder + path if it exists, or stating it must be built; this gates the rest of the epic. Haiku-buildable (grep + report).
**Test plan:** none (investigation ticket); proof = the verdict doc.

## Pre-computed constraints (auto-stamped at add time)
[hard_block] ⛔ NO SQLITE. EVER. POSTGRES OR FLAT-FILE ONLY. See banner at top of this file. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[hard_block] Log every state change and every interface crossing. State changes: ticket status — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] No TheIgors imports. UnseenUniversity must be portable without TheIgors present. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] No live keys or passwords in source. `.env` is gitignored. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] `pip install -e .` must succeed at all times (even with empty stubs). — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] Canonical dev-process memory — one home, no exceptions. Every dev-process artifact — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] device.py and shim.py are the design center. Every component inherits from — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] bus/ owns comms:// routing. Nothing outside bus/ speaks to IMAP directly. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] skeleton/ owns the MCP aggregator and flat-file registry. No Postgres dependency. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] devices/ contains one subdirectory per device; each is independently deployable. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] `~/.unseen_university/logs/<device>/<stream>/` is the canonical log hierarchy — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] Every ticket closes proven, or declares itself unproven — no discriminator. A ticket that — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
…and 39 more (lower-severity or capped) — query constraints_get for the full set
body.result: Resolved: no node-set+overlap embedder exists. The activation PRODUCER does exist — WordGraph.text_to_activation_vector() (word_graph.py:703) returns a spreading-activation map over lemma/bigram nodes — but Scraps collapses it to a dense 512-dim vector + cosine (embedding_engine.py:_wg_embed) and uses it only as a logged training signal, never as a retrieval embedder. Verdict: TO-BE-BUILT (keep the activation set, compare by node-overlap; stop collapsing to dense).
body.unproven_reason: Investigation ticket — proof is the written verdict, no red->green assertion form. Verdict delivered: graph-tree embedder does not exist; the producer does.
